description:
Rebel is a traditional handmade phinisi yacht built in 2020 in Sulawesi, Indonesia.
Measuring 30m in length, she accommodates up to 10 guests across 5 cabins and 4 spacious common areas and includes a fine wine cellar and an outdoor cinema under the stars. Inspired by the rich local craft of Indonesia and featuring hand-woven fabrics and carvings, the interiors are a blend of modern laid-back luxe with a tribal vibe.

crew.name: Lisa Joy D Silva
crew.bio:
most likely to:
Show you the most beautiful underwater coral gardens (and
explain how Rascal works to preserve them).
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“I love Raja Ampat for its vibrant colors and unique
topography, both above and below the surface.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“The best part of my job is providing guests with the trip of a
lifetime.”

crew.name: Masroni Bobo
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Share his love of stargazing.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“I love the stunning marine beauty of Komodo and Raja Ampat; they are my top sailing destinations.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Sailing from island to island and appreciating the beauty of each destination is what I love most about my job.”

crew.name: Muhammad Alwan
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Take you wild orchid spotting.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“My favorite sailing area is the Ring of Fire. I love snorkeling with whale sharks and visiting the pink beach of Sape.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“What I enjoy most about my job is the chance to learn from the captain, navigate to new destinations, gain valuable experience, and soak in the breathtaking scenery of Indonesia’s islands.”

crew.name: Ilham Jaya
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Organize an impromptu beach volleyball game.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“I enjoy sailing in Komodo and Raja Ampat due to their friendly, safe, and reliable weather conditions.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“What I like most about my job is steering the boat and tenders from place to place, all while enjoying the diverse natural beauty along the way.”

crew.name: Totok Hariyanto
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Entertain the young ones with impressions of cartoon characters, especially Woody Woodpecker.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Wayag in Raja Ampat is my top sailing destination because of its breathtaking scenery.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“I love finding and solving problems with the machinery, ensuring everything runs smoothly and efficiently.”

crew.name: Andri Budiman
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Get your kids excited about volcano-hiking.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Padar and Komodo are my favorite sailing areas because they offer beautiful scenery and easy tracks.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Working with various types of machinery, from seawater desalination to diving tank systems, and learning new things every day is what I enjoy most.”

crew.name: Irpandi
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Show off his acrobatic skills on one of our beach days.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“My favorite places are the waters of Raja Ampat. These areas are rich with large fish, and their marine life is well preserved.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“I love the ocean and have a passion for engines, so this job is the perfect combo for me.”

crew.name: I Gusti Ngurah Andre Pratama
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Give you his secret recipe for sambal.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Komodo and Padar Island are perfect for sailing, with their breathtaking scenery and captivating sunsets.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Plating food and experimenting with new menus is a favorite part of my job.”

crew.name: I Wayan Ade Sokma Yuliantara
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Spoil you with Balinese treats.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Komodo, with its stunning scenery and mesmerizing sunsets.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Delivering the best results and providing satisfaction to our guests is what I find most fulfilling in my field.”

crew.name: Ketut
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Treat you to the best impromptu head, neck and shoulder massage.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Raja Ampat is my favorite because of its abundance of beautiful fish and numerous picturesque islands.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Meeting people from all over the world is what I enjoy most about my role.”

crew.name: Samuel Bawole
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Know the best viewpoints for fabulous photographs or to set up a painting easel.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“My best sailing experiences are in Komodo and Raja Ampat, thanks to their excellent and safe weather conditions.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Traveling around Indonesia and discovering new places every day is definitely a highlight of my job.”

crew.name: Reynaldi Christof Alparis Sosinggih
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Create a brand-new sundowner in your honour.

FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Misool in Raja Ampat stands out as my favorite place to explore.”

WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Creating new and exciting drinks for guests is what I find most rewarding about my job.”
